user.title: Govee BLE Air Purifier
user.description: Choose a recently seen GVH7124 purifier, or enter a BLE address manually. This integration does not create automatic discovery prompts.

data_description.address: Only required when Recently seen purifier is set to Enter address manually.
data_description.polling_interval: How often Home Assistant actively connects over BLE to read power, PM2.5, and filter life.

custom_auto.title: Five Air Quality Steps
custom_auto.description: Configure the four boundaries between Excellent, Good, Fair, Bad, and Poor. Increases happen immediately; returns to cleaner levels happen only after the configured delay. Activate these rules with the device's Custom Auto switch.

excellent_good.name: Excellent to Good (20% / 40%)
excellent_good.description: Controls the boundary between Excellent air at 20% and Good air at 40%.

good_fair.name: Good to Fair (40% / 60%)
good_fair.description: Controls the boundary between Good air at 40% and Fair air at 60%.

fair_bad.name: Fair to Bad (60% / 80%)
fair_bad.description: Controls the boundary between Fair air at 60% and Bad air at 80%.

bad_poor.name: Bad to Poor (80% / 100%)
bad_poor.description: Controls the boundary between Bad air at 80% and Poor air at 100%.

error.address_required: Enter a BLE address or choose a recently seen purifier.
error.invalid_custom_auto_value: Enter whole numbers within the displayed ranges.
error.up_thresholds_not_ascending: Increase thresholds must rise from Excellent through Poor.
error.down_thresholds_not_ascending: Return thresholds must rise from Excellent through Bad.
error.down_threshold_above_up: A return threshold cannot exceed the increase threshold for the same air-quality boundary.

abort.already_configured: This air purifier is already configured.
abort.not_supported: This BLE device is not a supported Govee H7124 air purifier.
abort.unknown: Setup state was lost. Start setup again.

init.title: Five Air Quality Steps
init.description: Configure polling and the four boundaries between Excellent, Good, Fair, Bad, and Poor. Increases happen immediately; returns to cleaner levels happen only after the configured delay.

data_description.polling_interval: Use a longer interval if Bluetooth is unreliable or shared with other BLE devices.

excellent_good.name: Excellent to Good (20% / 40%)
excellent_good.description: Controls the boundary between Excellent air at 20% and Good air at 40%.

good_fair.name: Good to Fair (40% / 60%)
good_fair.description: Controls the boundary between Good air at 40% and Fair air at 60%.

fair_bad.name: Fair to Bad (60% / 80%)
fair_bad.description: Controls the boundary between Fair air at 60% and Bad air at 80%.

bad_poor.name: Bad to Poor (80% / 100%)
bad_poor.description: Controls the boundary between Bad air at 80% and Poor air at 100%.

error.invalid_custom_auto_value: Enter whole numbers within the displayed ranges.
error.up_thresholds_not_ascending: Increase thresholds must rise from Excellent through Poor.
error.down_thresholds_not_ascending: Return thresholds must rise from Excellent through Bad.
error.down_threshold_above_up: A return threshold cannot exceed the increase threshold for the same air-quality boundary.
